properties.description: Migrated from SSIS package SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts. Control-flow order: Execute SQL Task 1 (Lookup) → (expression gate flag==1) → Insert Email Records → Daily SII Metric (Collect Daily SII Metric data flow) → Only Send once a week.

activities.name: LKP_CheckTodaysData
activities.description: Replicates 'Execute SQL Task 1'. Queries tbl_SII_Vuln_History_Alerts for today's rows; returns flag=0 (data exists) or flag=1 (no data yet). Result consumed directly by GateOnTodaysData IfCondition — no pipeline variable needed.

source.sqlReaderQuery:
select
case when count(*)   > 0 then 0 else 1 end as flag
from tbl_SII_Vuln_History_Alerts
where cast(Import_Date as date) = cast(getdate() as date)

activities.name: GateOnTodaysData
activities.description: Replicates SSIS Precedence Constraint 1: EvalOp=ExpressionAndConstraint, Expression=@[User::TodaysData]==1. Executes InsertEmailRecords only when no data has been loaded today. Reads flag directly from CheckTodaysData Lookup output — no SetVariable needed.

ifTrueActivities.name: InsertEmailRecords
ifTrueActivities.description: Replicates 'Insert Records into Email Alerts Tbl' Execute SQL Task. Inserts rows from vw_SII_EmailAlerts_Daily_v2 into tbl_ssis_utility where To_ IS NOT NULL.

scripts.text:
INSERT INTO [PLHS].[dbo].[tbl_ssis_utility]
    ([To], [Subject], [body], [ReceiveDate], [SendDate], [BodyFormat], [CC])
SELECT
    [To_],
    [subject_],
    [body],
    GETDATE(),
    NULL,
    2,
    [CC]
FROM [PLHS].[dbo].[vw_SII_EmailAlerts_Daily_v2]
WHERE [To_] IS NOT NULL

activities.name: DF_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric
activities.description: Replicates the 'Daily SII Metric' Sequence Container / 'Collect Daily SII Metric' Data Flow Task. Reads vw_SII_EmailAlerts_Details, adds Import_Date = today, inserts into tbl_SII_Vuln_History_Alerts.

activities.name: ST_Only_Send_Once_A_Week
activities.description: Replicates 'Only Send once a week' Execute SQL Task. Sets SendDate on unsent tbl_ssis_utility rows only when today is not a holiday and not a Monday, using the Calendar table.

scripts.text:
DECLARE @updatedate DATE = (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN isHoliday = 0
             AND DATENAME(weekday, GETDATE()) <> 'Monday'
            THEN CurrentDate
            ELSE NULL
        END AS updatedate
    FROM Calendar
    WHERE CurrentDate = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
);

UPDATE tbl_ssis_utility
SET SendDate = @updatedate
WHERE SendDate IS NULL

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dataflow_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_335_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric') AS Dataflow_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Pipeline_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_335_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric') AS Pipeline_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_335_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric') AS Src_Container_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_filename_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_335_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric') AS Src_filename,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_335_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric') AS Src_path_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_335_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric') AS Tgt_Container_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_filename_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_335_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric') AS Tgt_filename,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_335_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric') AS Tgt_path_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Table_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_335_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric') AS Tgt_Table_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Schema_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_335_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric') AS Tgt_Schema_Name,

annotations: Connection manager PLHS → Linked Service LS_PLHS (SQL Server: DWDL0535V1\DL053511, DB: PLHS)
SSIS variable User::TodaysData consumed inline via activity('CheckTodaysData').output.firstRow.flag — no pipeline variable needed.
SSIS Execute SQL Tasks with inline T-SQL migrated to ADF Script activities — no stored procedures required.
